Bash(lsof -ti:8420 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; sleep 1; source .venv/bin/activate && python3 -c "
import asyncio
from app.db.session import engine
from app.db.base import Base
from app.db import models  # ensure all models loaded

async def reset\(\):
    async with engine.begin\(\) as conn:
        await conn.run_sync\(Base.metadata.drop_all\)
        await conn.run_sync\(Base.metadata.create_all\)
    print\('All tables recreated'\)

asyncio.run\(reset\(\)\)
")

Bash(source .venv/bin/activate && python3 -c "
import asyncio
from app.db.session import async_session_factory
from app.db.models import ApiKey
from sqlalchemy import select

async def get_key\(\):
    async with async_session_factory\(\) as s:
        r = await s.execute\(select\(ApiKey\).where\(ApiKey.role == 'admin'\)\)
        k = r.scalar_one_or_none\(\)
        if k:
            print\(f'prefix: {k.key_prefix}'\)
            print\(f'hash: {k.key_hash}'\)

asyncio.run\(get_key\(\)\)
")

Bash(source .venv/bin/activate && python3 -c "
import asyncio
from app.db.session import async_session_factory
from app.db.models import ApiKey, User
from app.auth.api_keys import generate_api_key, hash_api_key
from sqlalchemy import select

async def new_key\(\):
    async with async_session_factory\(\) as s:
        r = await s.execute\(select\(User\).where\(User.role == 'admin'\)\)
        user = r.scalar_one\(\)
        key, key_hash = generate_api_key\(\)
        api_key = ApiKey\(
            user_id=user.id,
            key_hash=key_hash,
            key_prefix=key[:4],
            label='admin-new',
            role='admin',
            is_active=True,
        \)
        s.add\(api_key\)
        await s.commit\(\)
        print\(key\)

asyncio.run\(new_key\(\)\)
")
